news.t: Trump Media just launched 5 ‘Made in America' ETFs, testing whether political power can function as an investable theme

holdings.infoBox: TSSD is an equity ETF with a total of 59 individual holdings. The top holdings are Palo Alto Networks stock at 9.29%, CrowdStrike Holdings at 7.88%, RTX Corporation at 7.54%, Fortinet at 7.40%, and Lockheed Martin at 6.03%.

overview.description: The Truth Social American Security & Defense ETF (TSSD) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in industrials equity. The fund is passively managed to provide exposure to US companies with significant revenue tied to the national defense and security industry. Companies with DEI policies are screened out, the remaining portfolio is market-cap weighted. TSSD was launched on Dec 30, 2025 and is issued by Truth Social.
infoTable: Truth Social Yorkville American Security & Defense Index

data.title: Trump Media just launched 5 ‘Made in America' ETFs, testing whether political power can function as an investable theme
data.text: Wall Street has seen plenty of thematic ETFs, but not one with a sitting U.S. president acting as a de facto marketing engine.

data.title: Truth Social ETFs Launch Today
